chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 1735 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of main case. 23-05-2023 Mr. Mazhar Ahmed, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G. ***** Despite directions, order dated 24.11.2022, whereby learned counsel for the petitioner was directed to file Deh Form-VII and other documents showing that the petitioner is owner of agricultural land in Deh Tirore Sangrar, Rohri District Sukkur, has not been complied with. Even on the last date of hearing i.e. 26.04.2023, matter was adjourned due to absence of learned counsel for the petitioner with caution that if aforesaid order is not complied with before next date of hearing, this petition shall be dismissed for non-compliance. Hence, in terms of order dated 26.04.2023, instant petition stands dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
